title: significance of unit 01 being Lilith based
display_title: significance of unit 01 being Lilith based
wikitext:
[]: significance of unit 01 being Lilith-based             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Fri Jan 14, 2011 10:12 pm Hi, I've got some questions after reading the wiki article . 1) What is the significance of Unit 01 being created from (eg born/cloned/whatever *sidesteps minefield topic*) Lilith- instead of Adam like the rest of the Evas? 2) Why did Nerv first use Adam (Unit 00), then Lilith (01), then back to Adam (02+)? Were they just trying all kinds of stuff in the early days or is there some more meaningful reason? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Fri Jan 14, 2011 10:31 pm There's probably something useful in this old thread right here. Also dug up this ancient ANF thread that I've never read before. - A controllable Lilith-surrogate was very desireable - Much easier to yank flesh off Lilith than grow Adam flesh from scratch (consider all the failures before Unit 00), but only so much flesh could be taken, or Lilith herself would become useless - maybe work on Zero had begun before Lilith was excavated (I'm not sure about the timeline, maybe someone else knows better) Also, having only one Lilith-derived Eva means Gendo holds a trump card.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jan 15, 2011 6:31 am Baz wrote: - A controllable Lilith-surrogate was very desireable

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sat Jan 15, 2011 7:58 am SEELE wanted a Lilith clone to use as a backup for the real Lilith. Yui took advantage of the fact that Unit-01 was irreplaceable, and hid her soul inside it. Gendo wanted Yui back, but all he got was Rei. He then became very protective of Unit-01, and wanted to use it to initiate 3rd Impact instead of Lilith. When Unit-01 ate Zeruel's S2 Engine/Organ, it became very dangerous to SEELE, because it now contained both Lilith's Fruit of Knowledge AND Adam's Fruit of Life, and thus capable of initiating 3rd Impact in a way that SEELE did not plan for. (e.g. too early, while there were still Angels). However, Gendo was pleased. There were meant to be 12 MP EVAs, rather than 9, and the early models (00, 02, 03, 04) were only made for test purposes and for Angel battles. All the Adam-based Evangelions were meant to battle Angels and to perform the "sacrament" to initiate SEELE's version of 3rd Impact. Probably this was meant as some kind of elaborate dance between 12 MP EVA's with the Fruit of Life, and one Lilith (clone) with the Fruit of Knowledge. However, as the "sacrament" was performed on Unit-01, the real Lilith emerged and took over 3rd Impact, by giving the choice to Shinji. Shinji's initial choice was in line with SEELE's agenda, but in the end Shinji chose the return of (separate) humanity. SEELE was defeated, Gendo was defeated. Humans win. (So what did Gendo want? I've had an idea, but will post that later in a separate thread.)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jan 15, 2011 8:02 am Jornophelanthas wrote: SEELE wanted a Lilith clone to use as a backup for the real Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Jan 15, 2011 8:06 am Jornophelanthas wrote: It could well be that he intended to leave earth inside Unit-01 with Yui and Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sat Jan 15, 2011 8:10 am I removed the Gendo part of my post to further refine it and give it its own thread, later today. Please do not discuss it in this thread, because I feel it would contaminate the topic of Unit-01 as a Lilith-based Evangelion. @Allemann: Regarding your comment, I think Shinji would be "liquefied" and drawn into Unit-01's body and soul, just like Yui. After all, something a lot like it happened in the Leliel battle, and arguably in EoE too. @Eva Yojimbo: I don't know. In case the real Lilith's body got destroyed by Angels, perhaps (or by destroying it in self-defense to prevent an Angel from initiating 3rd Impact with Lilith)? Or in case Lilith woke up and had to be destroyed? (Remember, Lilith's soul was not extracted into Rei by the time the decision was made to create Unit-01.)

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sat Jan 15, 2011 9:49 am Thanks everyone for the food for thought! Baz wrote: - A controllable Lilith-surrogate was very desireable - Much easier to yank flesh off Lilith than grow Adam flesh from scratch (consider all the failures before Unit 00), but only so much flesh could be taken, or Lilith herself would become useless - maybe work on Zero had begun before Lilith was excavated (I'm not sure about the timeline, maybe someone else knows better) Also, having only one Lilith-derived Eva means Gendo holds a trump card.

[]:             Quote Post by die-yng » Sat Jan 15, 2011 5:21 pm It's always good to have a backup. I'd think Seele would have even more aces up their sleeves, in case their original plan failed.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sat Jan 15, 2011 5:33 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: I removed the Gendo part of my post to further refine it and give it its own thread, later today. Please do not discuss it in this thread,

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Sat Jan 15, 2011 10:36 pm Allemann wrote: I can already imagine a 14-year-old distraughtly banging at the insider surface of the entry plug and screaming, while being taken away from the rest of humanity and going to a one way trip towards the cold and distant regions of dark space. "I did this only for you, Shinji!"

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sat Jan 22, 2011 10:30 pm COACH wrote: How much fun could it honestly be in there anyway? (Think King of the Hill): Yui: Yep. ... Gendo: Yeeeeep. *Cracks beer*
